title: Upon Snare, An Usurer.
content:
Snare, ten i' th' hundred calls his wife; and why?
    She brings in much by carnal usury.
    He by extortion brings in three times more:
    Say, who's the worst, th' exactor or the whore?
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Upon Snare, An Usurer.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
